subcodes.first_line: My remembrance is a fire by which the hearts of the sincere are set ablaze, and a light whereby the faces of them that are nigh are illumined, and a nectar thou beholdest [3.5s]... ...Should they attempt to conceal its light on the continent,  it will assuredly rear its head in the midmost heart of the ocean
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکری نار تشتعل به قلوب المخلصین و نور تستضیء به وجوه المقربین و مره تراه
subcodes.subjects: @light and darkness, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @twofold; threefold station of the Manifestation of God, @martyrdom of the Bab
